title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 1st April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: No need to panic; even if last quarter slightly weak, doing extremely well; hospital valuations improving, will recover quickly.
recommendations.detail: Hold, no need to panic and sell. Even if the last quarter was slightly weak, it is doing extremely well; valuations for all hospital stocks are improving, so the stock won't take long to recover.

recommendations.note: One of the better stocks; benefits from semiconductor recovery and Gujarat plant commissioning.
recommendations.detail: Definitely one of the better stocks; with the semiconductor recovery and once the Gujarat plant is commissioned, definitely hold.

recommendations.note: Don't sell at current levels; data-centre story, now at a decent valuation after recent volatility.
recommendations.detail: At current levels you shouldn't sell, because recently the stock has seen a lot of ups and downs; positive on the data-centre story, and it is now available at a decent valuation (~436).

recommendations.note: Worst almost over; railway monopoly but single-customer type; stable dividend player, don't expect outperforming gains (PE 25-26).
recommendations.detail: Hold; worst almost over. Railway monopoly (reservations + catering) but single-customer type; already ~518; unless results dramatically improve, becoming a stable dividend player from here on; don't expect outperforming gains (PE already 25-26).

recommendations.note: Hold/buy; better times ahead esp. after oil crisis; institutional selling absorbed; at 52-week low a fresh/surprise buy.
recommendations.detail: Hold; for range-bound players definitely better times ahead, especially after the oil crisis. Institutional selling absorbed, stock holding ~40-42; at 52-week low it's in fact a fresh buy, even as a surprise bet, since the stock at least shows profits.
